    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NativeOpenCLFFTBackend
    OpenCL implementation of FFTProvider using a Direct Fourier Transform (DFT) kernel.

  • Uses of GPUBackend in org.episteme.nativ.mathematics.linearalgebra.backends

    Classes in org.episteme.nativ.mathematics.linearalgebra.backends that implement GPUBackend
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NativeCUDADenseLinearAlgebraBackend
    High-performance Dense CUDA Backend using Project Panama (FFM).
    class 
    NativeCUDASparseLinearAlgebraBackend
    Robust CUDA acceleration backend using Project Panama to interface with CUDA and CUBLAS.
    class 
    NativeOpenCLDenseLinearAlgebraBackend
    OpenCL implementation of Dense Linear Algebra Provider.
    class 
    NativeOpenCLSparseLinearAlgebraBackend
    OpenCL implementation of GPUBackend for cross-platform hardware acceleration, integrated with Sparse and Dense Linear Algebra support.
